title: anthemis cretica subsp. candicans
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. candicans, also known as White Chrysanthemum or Candicans Daisy, is a perennial herb in the daisy family, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. candicans include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe skin irritations, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
